data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "All four children CLOSED (1f3d P1, 4b59 P2, 48c8 observability, bd80 Jira-cleanup; test-hardening folded into P1/P2 per plan). All three defects resolved end-to-end and landed via Gerrit: P1 comment-pagination+truncation-guard (a6cdad0e2), P2 inbound-link-direction+unification (778/af433d2b4), observability fail-loud machinery (785/df0ac80be) + activation (810/c357b8e5d). Jira cleanup executed under the T4 safety plan with EXPLICIT human approval: 63,157 duplicate bot comments purged across the 13 cap-inflated tickets, all now 22-76 comments (far below the 5000 cap) -> comment sync restored. Force-closing because the completion-verifier's 2 residual blocks are artifact-in-repo over-specifications inappropriate for one-time operational data-cleanup: the 222MB backup + dry-run + deletion-log artifacts live in $CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/jira-cleanup/ (retained, evidenced in bd80 comments) and are deliberately NOT committed (repo-bloat/module-size). bd80 itself was force-closed for the same reason with a full documented audit trail. Epic goal (0 comment-cap failures + 0 inbound-link cycle-rejections for the previously-affected tickets) achieved.". Session: a9f45bda-d9d9-460c-a61d-32796b3f8d2d.
